# select-templating — Changelog

> Diff structurel de l'API (selectors, inputs, outputs, models) entre versions stables, jusqu'à `v21.3.1`. Les versions sans changement d'API sont omises.

## 21.3.0

~ service `CoreSelectKeyManager` : + `setActiveItemByElement(item: CoreSelectPanelElement<T>): void`

## 21.0.0

Composant introduit (`LuCoreSelectTotalCountDirective`, `LuCoreSelectNoClueDirective`, `LuDisabledOptionDirective`, `LuOptionGroupDirective`, `LuOptionDirective`, `LuCoreSelectPanelHeaderDirective`).
